nodes.speaker: narrator
nodes.text: [SUB-SCENE] Entered via call_scene/macro. Will check if args were passed (only macro passes args).

nodes.speaker: narrator
nodes.text: [SUB — PASS] `greeting` arg was pushed into the variable scope by macro. This message only appears if a macro called us.

nodes.speaker: narrator
nodes.text: [SUB — INFO] No `greeting` arg. This is expected if a call_scene (not macro) reached us — call_scene does not push args.
[SUB — INFO] Sub-scene ending. With no `nextScene` set, this should pop the call stack and return to the caller.
